nasb.text: But if the bright spot remains in its place and does not spread, it is only the scar of the boil; and the priest shall pronounce him clean.

esv.text: But if the spot remains in one place and does not spread, it is the scar of the boil, and the priest shall pronounce him clean.

cnv.text: 火斑若是在原處止住，沒有蔓延，就是瘡的疤痕，祭司就要宣布他為潔淨。

ccb.text: 如果患处的斑原样未变，没有扩散，便是疮疤，祭司要宣布他是洁净的。
